loadError.message: Could not load the auctions. Please try again.

watchlist.toggleFailed: Could not update your watchlist. Please try again.

placeBid.title: Place a bid
placeBid.body: Enter your bid and press 'Bid'. Min bid is pre-filled. You must bid at least 1 CZ$ above the current bid.

countdown.title: Time left and auto-extension
countdown.body: If you bid in the last 10 minutes, the auction is automatically extended. You can always respond if someone outbids you at the very end.

hint.title: How auctions work
hint.minBidBody: A new bid must be at least 1 CZ$ above the current bid. Min bid is pre-filled in the input field.
hint.autoExtendBody: Bids in the last 10 minutes extend the auction, so you can always respond if someone outbids you at the very end.

ticker.bidCount: {count, plural, one {1 recent bid} other {# recent bids}}

stats.auctionsLeading: {count, plural, one {1 auction} other {# auctions}} you lead

history.emptyWon: You haven't won any auctions yet
history.emptySold: You haven't sold any riders yet
history.emptyLost: No lost auctions in your history

proxy.help: We bid up to this for you, 1 CZ$ at a time. You only lose the lead if someone goes above your cap. Your cap stays private.

empty.wishlistNoResults: No active auctions on your wishlisted riders
empty.noInvolvementMySituation: You're not involved in any active auctions
empty.wishlistHelp: Turn off 'Wishlist only' or add riders from the rider overview
empty.browseSuggestion: Switch to 'All' to browse the market
empty.startAuctionSuggestion: Go to Riders and start an auction

feed.title: Live bids · your auctions
feed.empty: No activity yet on your auctions.

modal.questionPrefix: Are you sure you want to

celebration.title: You won the auction!
celebration.subtitle: The rider is now on your team

priceChanged.title: Price changed
priceChanged.newMinBid: The minimum bid is now {amount} CZ$. Do you still want to bid?

error.bidFailed: The bid could not be placed

warning.squadCapacity: Heads up: you are now leading auctions equivalent to {totalAfter} riders (max {maxRiders}). If you are still {exceedBy} over when the window closes: auto-sale + {fine} CZ$ fine + {points} penalty points.
